programme.title: Hybrid World: The Plan to Modify and Control the Human Race
programme.desc: Behind closed doors scientists and corporations have breached genetic codes that separate the individuality of all animal and plant species on earth. Laboratories around the world are honing their skills while our humanity and dignity as a species is on the operating table like a universal Frankenstein, subject to a wholesale psychic and physiological re-design under the guise of progress. The proponents claim the field of "Transhumanism" will change the world by eliminating sickness and famine while at the same time, governments and military groups around the globe are having clandestine meetings to discuss super soldiers, super intelligence, and even super animals to maintain military dominance and control over the populations of the world. Even more horrifying they must create committees to implement plans to defend their nations against future terrorism performed by transhumans (modified human beings) with the universal understanding that no nation can afford NOT to engage in this apocalyptic future of genetically altered life. We are at war for the mind of a generation and the soul of the human race. Billions of dollars are at stake with corporations and powerful individuals looking toward a post human future world. If we care about our humanity, then the time is NOW to stand up and understand where science and technology are taking us and to do something about it. Our foods are already being genetically altered with devastating side effects which are now coming to light. Will we allow experiments with genetic engineering to excel to a horrifying level where they create an unthinkable race of non-human entities? What level of horrifying abominations have already been committed?

programme.title: California Paranormal
programme.desc: SHORT - (Cable / Digital) California is a weird place, but just how weird can best be told by residents with bone chilling true stories of Paranormal and Supernatural encounters that defy description - from Alien visitations to Poltergeist manifestations that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: The Dark Mirror of Magick
programme.desc: "This is the most remarkable record of a supernatural event I have ever witnessed." - Wayne Darwen, Director. On January 3rd, 2001, documentary writer/producer Wayne Darwen brought a professional TV news crew into the Temple of the O.T.A. to visually record a remarkable event: the summoning of the ancient spirit Vassago. On February 1st, the Los Angeles affiliate of a National TV Network broadcast an edited version of Vassago's Prophecy, confirming that the Spirit had predicted a major news event. Only 13 days after the ritual was visually recorded, President Laurent Kabila of the Congo was assassinated! In this video version we show you the entire operation in sequence, exactly as it happened with no rehearsals and no retakes. Wayne Darwen also interviews the Magister Thabion (Poke Runyon) and the mystic seer Frater Solomon. Their unrehearsed answers to his probing questions leave no doubt as to the philosophical depth and spiritual power of Solomon's ancient Magick even in this modern age. In "The Magick of Solomon" video we dramatically reenacted magical rituals for instructive purposes, whereas "Dark Mirror of Magick" is the record of an actual magical operation of historical significance. We believe that this remarkable documentary will be studied and commented on for years to come.This 2011 edition has ten more minutes of new footage added with commentary on the Vassago Prophecy, as subsequently revealed in the following two years, plus a new prophecy from Vassago himself. Viewer discretion is advised, do not engage in these practices without the supervision of an experienced adept.CAUTION; This DVD shows actual Spirit Summoning, not recommended for immature viewers.

programme.title: Nacho Mountain
programme.desc: Keefer has a talent. He can eat...A LOT. But it’s not until after getting fired from his job, finding his girl getting railed by a tranny and almost getting arrested for drug trafficking, that Keefer decides (with the help of his best friend Meegosh) to start an underground food eating competition. After the health crazed Mayor Fingstal and his cronies Officers Slivjack and Biggsley catch wind of it, all hell breaks loose. Then it all comes down to one final food battle from hell, THE NACHO MOUNTAIN! Set to a killer Stoner Rock soundtrack with loads of babes and crazy characters in the vein of Porky's and Meatballs, Nacho Mountain is sure to please those who have gotten beaten down, only to eat their way to the top!

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim Harmsen trains at Summit Point, testing rapid-fire shooting and vehicle combat tactics. At Fort Sumter, he reflects on the Civil War’s legacy with a 100-gun salute. Then it’s off to Avidity Arms, where Rob Pincus joins him to explore real-world home defense. From tactical holsters to high-speed vehicle drills, Tim puts it all to the test in a live-fire evolution under pressure.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Shots, Tim Harmsen heads to the heart of American gun craftsmanship with an exclusive, behind-the-scenes tour of Palmetto State Armory, where freedom is literally built on the production floor. From the anodizing line to live assembly, Tim witnesses American ingenuity in action as a rifle comes to life before his eyes. With the epic 10,000-Round Challenge complete, it’s time for some serious maintenance. The crew at SEAL 1 steps in with their cutting-edge nanotechnology to give the battle-worn BCM AK the deep clean it deserves. Once the guns are gleaming, it’s time to send rounds downrange. Teaming up with top firearms influencer Sootch, Tim takes aim at a new challenge, including a 1,000-yard Wild Shot that pushes precision, patience, and performance to the limit.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Step into the heart of innovation with The Big Reveal! Join Sheriff Mark Lamb and MMA legend Ken Shamrock as they explore groundbreaking American companies revolutionizing their industries. From elite camo designed through deer vision science to lightweight titanium firearm suppressors and EMF-neutralizing tech for peak performance—each story uncovers passion, ingenuity, and grit. Discover what’s shaping America’s entrepreneurial spirit. It’s not just business. It’s The Big Reveal.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc:
"ATA 213: Cleveland Preview, Bracket Breakdowns, and Hot Take Scale Predictions
The road to Cleveland is set, and Around the ACL is breaking down everything you need to know before bags fly. Meesh, Jake, and Anthony dive into the Pro Singles brackets, analyzing each path to the final and where the biggest challenges—and opportunities—sit. Then it’s on to Doubles, where the competition is stacked and the margins are razor thin. Which teams are positioned for a deep run? And where could we see an early shake-up?
To close the show, we turn up the heat with Hot Take Scale—predicting what’s coming next in the season. How likely is it that Logan Chamberlain grabs a Singles title soon? Will Sammy Soto break through with a finals appearance? Could a non–Top 10 team steal the next major—or a player outside the Top 20 take Singles?
Brackets, bold predictions, and plenty of debate—this one sets the stage for Cleveland."

programme.title: S1E1 Driven
programme.desc:
GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN takes you deep inside the world of Supercross and Motocross champion James Stewart. Ride alongside the man known as the fastest on two wheels as he shares the highs, lows, and relentless drive that shaped his legendary career.
GoPro Original Series DRIVEN also follows X Games star and snowmobile icon Chris Burandt. Join him on a thrilling journey to discover what fuels his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. This is raw, high-octane storytelling you can’t miss.

programme.title: S1E2 Driven
programme.desc: In this episode of GoPro Original Series DRIVEN, we continue our in-depth look at X Games star and snowmobile legend Chris Burandt. Join him on an adrenaline-fueled journey to uncover what drives his passion and dedication to the lifestyle he has loved since childhood. The second part goes inside the life of three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano. Watch as he pushes the limits on the track and discovers how he uses his racing platform to make a difference in the lives of others.

programme.title: S1E3 Driven
programme.desc: Three-time NASCAR Cup Series Champion and Daytona 500 winner Joey Logano continues to push the limits on the track while finding new ways to use his racing platform to make a positive impact on others. In this episode of GoPro Motorsports Original Series DRIVEN, step into the world of DC Shoes co-founder, rally car driver, and marketing mastermind Ken Block. Strap in for an electrifying journey through the moments and passions that have fueled his remarkable career.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E2 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: Django, Kill! 1967
programme.desc: In "Django, Kill!" Tomas Milian stars in one of the most surreal and violent Spaghetti Westerns ever filmed. Left for dead after a gold robbery, a mysterious gunslinger claws his way back to life and hunts down the traitors who betrayed him. Along the way, he enters a nightmare world of greed, cruelty, and madness where no one can be trusted. Brutal, hallucinatory, and unforgettable, this cult classic pushes the Western to its wildest limits.

programme.title: Death Valley 1982
programme.desc: In Death Valley, a young boy’s vacation turns into a nightmare when he witnesses a brutal murder in the desert. Trapped in the desolate wilderness with his mother (Catherine Hicks) and her new boyfriend (Paul Le Mat), he becomes the target of a relentless killer. Starring a young Peter Billingsley and Stephen McHattie as the menacing murderer, this suspense-filled thriller blends chilling atmosphere, tense chases, and shocking violence against the unforgiving backdrop of the Arizona desert.

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?: Odd Jobs
programme.desc: Frank Nicotero takes to the streets to ask people about the wildest, wackiest news stories. In "Odd Jobs," contestants learn about a kid-run food truck, a school board member with a special license and a senior citizen that's into heavy work.

programme.title: Finding Adventure: Mom Daughter Duo Drop Into the Wild
programme.desc: The mother-daughter dynamic duo of Cher and Sabria Delaine are best friends and do almost everything together except get out into nature. So Kinga meets up with ladies to mix things up and try to blend Cher’s island life with some southern comfort.

programme.title: Local Love: Devoted Dad Finding Love is Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: Entre, a single dad and musician, searches for his perfect partner in Des Moines. Three bachelorettes compete for a coveted second date. From spirited bar games and paddling on the lake to sweet bakery moments, who will take the cake?
